hero.title: EREBUS
hero.subtitle: Develop. Deploy. Declutter
hero.description:
Join us for EREBUS, a two-day hackathon tackling one of modern aerospace’s most urgent challenges—space debris.
Collaborate, innovate, and build solutions that shape a safer, more sustainable future for space exploration.

about.title: About the Hackathon
about.description: EREBUS is a two-day hackathon bringing together aerospace, innovation, and space science enthusiasts to tackle the growing challenge of space debris. With multiple tracks to choose from, participants collaborate in teams to build impactful prototypes addressing real-world orbital sustainability problems. From predictive modeling and collision avoidance to debris mitigation strategies, each track pushes the boundaries of practical space solutions. Guided by mentors and evaluated by industry experts, teams will transform ideas into tangible innovations shaping the future of space.

timeline.description: Sign up and form your team. Early registration is encouraged as spots are limited.
Opening ceremony, problem statements revealed, and hacking begins.
Scheduled check-ins with mentors to refine your ideas and get expert feedback.
Progress review and feedback from judges. Adjust your approach based on insights.
Final submissions and demo preparation. Present your solution to the judges.
Winners announced, prizes distributed, and closing celebration.
Winners announced, prizes distributed, and closing celebration.

company.name: Terionix
company.description: GreenTech Solutions is a leading innovator in sustainable technology and e-waste management. Founded with the mission to reduce the environmental impact of electronic waste, we develop cutting-edge recycling technologies and circular economy solutions that give electronics a second life.
